name: build-package-pcf
description: Build, validate, test, and package Microsoft Power Apps Component Framework components.

interface.shortDescription: Build and package Power Apps PCF components.
interface.longDescription: Create or modify PCF field and dataset controls, validate their implementation, run production builds, and package managed or unmanaged Dataverse solutions.
defaultPrompt: Build a production-ready PCF field control.
Package this PCF component as a managed solution.
Diagnose and fix this PCF build failure.
